review_warnings: Intermediate blind uncertainty is accepted where labeled normal-size landmarks and the clockwise loop confirm the intended axes.
Continuity metric warnings at 135->157.5, 157.5->180, and 270->292.5 are natural head-turn changes without a visible snap, reversal, clipping, identity change, or broken attachment.
